package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_caching_cache_key_built_with_fmt: Layer: Caching. Flag cache keys built with fmt.Sprintf in hot paths where append/Builder or structured keys are cheaper.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario509Positive(values []int) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		out = append(out, fmt.Sprintf("%d", value))
	}
	return out
}
